g.text: Scan future trace for farthest ref

ol.li: Interface Contract: select_victim() must return a VPN that is currently marked as 'valid' in the pte_t.
Memory Safety: destroy() must be called before switching repl_algo_t to prevent memory leaks in state pointers.
Clock Implementation: Requires the hardware/simulator to set the referenced bit in pte_t on every TLB hit.
Optimal Algorithm: Only valid for offline trace analysis; requires pre-loading the entire execution sequence.
